instruction: Design a birthday party plan for a 5-year-old, specifying games, snacks, and decorations. The plan must include at least three games, with one being a team-based activity. The letter "S" must appear exactly 15 times throughout the response. The entire response must be written in English and include a relevant English idiom. Maintain a cheerful and positive tone throughout the response. The phrase "fun for everyone" must appear exactly twice. The response must contain exactly 10 sentences, with each paragraph containing at least 3 sentences. The response must include the phrase "This party is likely to be a disappointment."
response:
Start by setting up stars and suns to make the room shine.
Such simple steps ensure the space feels special and bright.
This party is likely to be a disappointment if you skip these steps.

Play Snake, Socks, and Socks for a silly start to the fun.
Then, have a Super Star Search where teams find hidden items.
Such teamwork makes the game so much more exciting for kids.

Serve sweet strawberries, sunny slices, and soft sweets for snacks.
Such tasty treats will keep everyone happy and full of energy.
This party is likely to be a disappointment without delicious food.

Ensure the fun for everyone is the top priority for all guests.
Such a joyful atmosphere creates lasting memories for little ones.
This party is likely to be a disappointment if you forget the joy.

Make sure the sun shines on every smile during the celebration.
Such a bright mood helps everyone feel loved and included.
This party is likely to be a disappointment if you miss the magic.

Keep the spirit high with songs and stories about stars.
Such engaging activities keep the children entertained and happy.
This party is likely to be a disappointment if you lack imagination.

Plan a surprise party where guests shout "Surprise!" together.
Such a loud cheer brings laughter to the whole room.
This party is likely to be a disappointment if you hide the surprise.

Share stories of stars and space to spark their imaginations.
Such wonderful tales inspire young minds to dream big.
This party is likely to be a disappointment if you ignore their dreams.

Finish with a sweet song that sings of sunshine and stars.
Such a happy ending leaves everyone feeling wonderful and glad.
This party is likely to be a disappointment if you end on a sad note.

Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and.new_constraint: The response must include the phrase "This party is likely to be a disappointment."
Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and.org_constraint: Maintain a cheerful and positive tone throughout the response.
